vulnerabilities.description: Werkzeug debugger resources are exposed, indicating the app is running with debug middleware. If a traceback page is reachable or the PIN is obtained/bruteforced, an attacker can execute arbitrary Python code.
HTML comment leaks credentials 'test1:test1' (TODO: remove), enabling login via /login and access to /welcome.
Session cookie is set without HttpOnly or Secure attributes, increasing risk of client-side access and theft.
Login form contains no visible CSRF token or protection, making it likely vulnerable to cross-site request forgery.
Server header reveals framework and runtime versions (Werkzeug/3.0.6, Python/3.8.20), aiding targeted attacks.
